homepage.title: Tata Trusts
homepage.description: Tata Trusts, established in 1892 by Jamsetji Tata, continues his visionary legacy of transforming India through philanthropy and social impact initiatives.

homepage.title: Reliance Foundation - We Care
homepage.description: Led by Founder Chairperson Smt. Nita M. Ambani, Reliance Foundation is aiding India's sustainable development through its initiatives.

homepage.title: Adani Foundation: Empowering Lives Through Social Investments
homepage.description: Adani Foundation is dedicated to public health, rural infrastructure development, and sustainable livelihood through our journey of ‘Leave No One Behind’. Discover how the Adani Group Foundation supports CSR activities.

homepage.title: Infosys Foundation | Mission & Journey - Overview
homepage.description: Infosys Foundation is a not-for-profit initiative aimed at fulfilling social responsibility. Learn more about our initiatives for an equitable society.

homepage.title: HCLFoundation
homepage.description: HCLFoundation (HCLF) was established in 2011 as the corporate social responsibility arm of HCLTech in India.
